_publications._publicationTitle: Icariin Promotes Osteogenic Differentiation in a Cell Model with NF1 Gene Knockout by Activating the cAMP/PKA/CREB Pathway.

_contextSnippet: the viability of the cells gradually increased with the time of icariin addition, which was observed in both cell lines 2−7 and 2−12
details: Icariin treatment increased cell viability in NF1 knockout C2C12 cells (both 2-7 and 2-12 lines) in a time-dependent manner
